text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After inviting Tazuna to a day out, I'm<n>waiting for
her reply, when...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the invite!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I have to decline!<n>Lately, my work
has been piling up,<n>so I don't think I'll be able to
step out<n>of the office today...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But we should certainly go out some<n>other time!
I'll let you know when I'm<n>free!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to idle around, I decide to<n>see
what's going on around the<n>academy.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Oho! Target sighted!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
What luck! You are just the person I<n>was looking
for!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I say, you and Tazuna seem to be<n>getting along
quite well as of late!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
How nice! She always seems to<n>enjoy talking
about you!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Therefore! I require your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've noticed she's been<n>overworking
herself. She is<n>undoubtedly passionate, but we
cannot have her health breaking<n>down!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: In summary! Tazuna Hayakawa<n>needs a break!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, it might be better if I show you.<n>Come!
Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without knowing where we're going,<n>I'm
whisked off to...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The hallway outside the director's<n>office.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: You'll understand once you go in.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But you must do so... stealthily. Be as<n>quiet as
you possibly can when you<n>enter...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following Director Akikawa's<n>instructions to the
letter, I tiptoe into<n>the room.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once inside, I notice someone laying<n>down on the
sofa.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She looks exhausted. Undoubtedly,<n>she's been
working herself to the<n>bone for the sake of the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I look back at the slightly open door to<n>see
Director Akikawa peeking in.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She mouths the words, "Leave her<n>duties to me!"

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I give my own silent nod in return and<n>place a
coat over Tazuna as she<n>sleeps.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hrm?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I must have fallen asleep...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! Wh-what are you doing<n>here?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, good morning...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's not morning!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: How long have I been asleep?
choice_data_list: For a couple of hours or so.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That long?! Ahhh, this is bad! I've still<n>got so
much left to do!
choice_data_list: The director said she would take care of it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director Akikawa said that? But...
choice_data_list: She said you need a break.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: A break...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose I have been pushing<n>myself too
hard lately.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And, well... I do feel morerefreshed now.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I even had a pretty nice dream...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sorry...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It's a secret! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her duties relieved, Tazuna and I go<n>out and
enjoy some time together.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And suddenly, the door behind me<n>closes with a
thud.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I must have fallen asleep!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Dismay! I wanted to allow her to rest<n>before
surprising her, but we failed...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa?! What surprise?<n>What's
going on?

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, since it's come to this... Trainer!<n>This is an
executive order!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your mission! Take Tazuna out for a<n>nice,
relaxing break!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her protests, I whisk Tazuna<n>away for a
much-needed break.
